title: Chimp Memory Matrix
description: An interactive working memory training simulator modeled directly after the famous Kyoto University primate research where chimpanzees (Ayumu) consistently outperform humans in spatial short-term retention. Built client-side inside standalone browser rows, the program generates integers (1 through 9) mapped onto random coordinates across a minimalist grid layout. Selecting block '1' triggers an immediate cascading masking sequence that turns all remaining numerical elements into plain white square masks, testing precise numerical path reconstruction arrays.
